name: fizziwig
description: Fizziwig — a free, open-source, local-first AI coding assistant powered by llama.cpp

chatParticipants.name: fizziwig
chatParticipants.description: Ask your local LLM about your code

fizziwig.modelPath.description: Absolute path to your GGUF model file. If empty, you will be prompted on first launch.

fizziwig.serverPort.description: Port for the local llama-server process.

fizziwig.contextSize.description: Context window size in tokens. Reduce if you have limited RAM.

fizziwig.serverUrl.description: Override the server URL (useful if you want to point at an external server instead of the bundled one).

fizziwig.modelName.description: Model name sent in API requests (informational for most local servers).

fizziwig.binaryPath.description: Optional absolute path to an external llama-server binary to use instead of the bundled one.
